name: Uninsured for cyber/AI issues, other party is AI company. What now?

mainEntity.name: Uninsured for cyber/AI issues, other party is AI company. What now?

acceptedAnswer.description: Proceed self-funded or small claims if under limits; platforms deep-pocketed but immune.[1][6] Key factors: fee-shifting rare, costs high.[3] Assess affordability, contingency seek, or abandon.[1] High risk.
